title: erlangea chevalieri
intro: Erlangea chevalieri, also known as Lebombo ginger, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are commonly used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Erlangea chevalieri include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the roots in hot water or using it as a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
